xpath.attribute: a.value_ids.filtered(lambda value: value.id in available_value_ids_by_attribute.get(a.id, avialable_value_ids or []))
a.value_ids.filtered(lambda value: value.id in available_value_ids_by_attribute.get(a.id, avialable_value_ids or []))
a.value_ids.filtered(lambda value: value.id in available_value_ids_by_attribute.get(a.id, avialable_value_ids or []))

template.name: Gadgetflix Radio and Multi attributes in Filter

xpath.attribute: sorted(a.value_ids.filtered(lambda value: value.id in available_value_ids_by_attribute.get(a.id, avialable_value_ids or [])), key=lambda v: v.id not in attrib_set)
a.value_ids.filtered(lambda value: value.id in available_value_ids_by_attribute.get(a.id, avialable_value_ids or []))

sorted(product.valid_product_template_attribute_line_ids, key=lambda ptal: not (len(ptal.product_template_value_ids._only_active()) == 1 and not ptal.product_template_value_ids._only_active()[0].is_custom and ptal.attribute_id.display_type != 'multi'))
o_wsale_product_page_variants d-flex flex-column gap-4 list-unstyled js_add_cart_variants #{ul_class}

li.t-if: single and not ptavs[0].is_custom and attribute.display_type != 'multi'

template.name: Gadgetflix Shop By Device Menu Groups
Gadgetflix Shop By Device Mobile Groups

t.t-value: (request.session['website_sale_cart_quantity'] if 'website_sale_cart_quantity' in request.session else request.cart.cart_quantity) or 0
request.cart.order_line.filtered(lambda line: not line.display_type and line.product_id and line.product_uom_qty) if cart_qty else []

request.env['gadgetflix.shop.by.device.menu'].sudo().search(['&', ('active', '=', True), '|', ('website_id', '=', False), ('website_id', '=', website.id)], order='sequence, id').filtered(lambda menu: menu.link_ids.filtered(lambda link: link.active))

div.p: Mobile accessories for protection, charging, storage, and everyday use across India.
Get updates on new accessory drops and exclusive offers.

t.t-value: (product_prices.get(product.id, {}) or {'price_reduce': product.list_price}).get('price_reduce') if product_prices else product.list_price

span.span: Shop practical accessories for phones, watches, laptops, and daily carry.

div.h2: Get new accessory drops and offers
div.p: Subscribe for updates on mobile cases, anti-yellow covers, screen protectors, chargers, cables, laptop bags, wallets, and watch accessories.

xpath.p: Explore stylish, durable, and premium mobile accessories made for protection, performance, and everyday convenience.

t.t-value: category and ('Search in %s' % category.name) or 'Search products'

a.t-attf-class: gf-shop-tab #{category and c.id == category.id and 'active' or ''}

div.placeholder: A detailed, formatted description to promote your product on this page. Use '/' to discover more features.

div.h1: Shop Smart. Protect Better. Look Premium.

div.p: Discover modern mobile accessories made for daily protection and stylish use — including anti-yellow cases, tempered glass, chargers, cables, power banks, laptop bags, wallets, and watch accessories for every gadget lover.
Stay ahead with our latest and most popular tech accessories, built for modern lifestyles.
Discover categories made to help you quickly choose the best accessories for protection, style, charging, and everyday use.
Explore protection, charging, carry, and watch essentials in one place.

span.span: Find every product type from the main catalog.

div.p: No public categories are available yet.
Explore the latest accessories added to our store — fresh designs, upgraded protection, and smart tech essentials for your everyday use.
Add more accessories to show this section.

div.h1: Accessories that protect, charge, and travel with you.
div.p: Gadgetflix brings practical mobile accessories to shoppers across India, with accessories selected for daily use, device protection, charging, and carry needs.

article.p: Cases, screen protectors, chargers, cables, bags, wallets, and watch accessories are arranged so customers can shop faster.
Every product category is focused on accessories people use every day: protection, power, storage, and style.
New arrivals and featured picks keep the store updated with current phone models, useful accessories, and seasonal demand.

div.p: A quick preview of cases, chargers, bags, wallets, and protection accessories from the current collection.
Select accessories for the About page from each product's Website Sections settings.
Reach us for product fit, order support, bulk requirements, partnerships, or store information.

article.p: Ask about phone model fit, case compatibility, screen protector options, charger type, cable length, or watch strap sizing.
Get help with cart, checkout, delivery questions, invoices, returns, refunds, and post-purchase communication.
Connect with the team for collaborations, bulk accessory requirements, reseller inquiries, or custom catalog discussions.

div.p: We back every Gadgetflix anti-yellow case with an official warranty. If your case ever develops a yellow tint, we'll replace it with a brand-new one. No hassle, no receipts.

div.span: Take a quick photo of the yellowed case.
Reach out to us with your order reference.
We ship a brand-new case directly to your door.
If your anti-yellow case ever yellows, we replace it once — completely free.
Specifically covers case yellowing, excluding physical wear, tears, or drops.
Physical damage, cuts, structural alterations, or misuse voids the warranty.

div.p: This warranty applies exclusively to Gadgetflix anti-yellow cases. Terms and conditions apply. One free replacement per purchase.

button.name: o_payment_submit_button
button.class: btn btn-primary w-100 py-3 mt-2 fw-semibold

template.name: Gadgetflix – Rename checkout step to Payment
Gadgetflix – Hide Promo Code on Cart Page
Gadgetflix – Hide Loyalty/Coupon on Cart Page

div.class: d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center h-100 d-none bg-white position-absolute w-100 h-100 top-0 start-0
text-center p-5 text-muted flex-grow-1 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center

a.class: btn w-100 mt-3 py-2 fw-bold text-uppercase gf-btn-black

button.class: btn btn-link text-dark text-decoration-none shadow-none px-2 gf-cart-qty-btn gf-cart-qty-minus

input.class: form-control text-center gf-cart-qty-input fw-bold px-1 border-0 shadow-none bg-transparent

button.class: btn btn-link text-dark text-decoration-none shadow-none px-2 gf-cart-qty-btn gf-cart-qty-plus

a.class: btn w-100 mb-2 py-2 fw-bold shadow-sm gf-btn-black

div.p: Please do not refresh or close this page.
